CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. This is the total of Funding Sources for the Purchase Transaction only. It is the sum of related Funding Sources where Type is one of the following: Loan (Purchase), Gift (Private), Grant (Public/Non-Profit), Buyer's Cash, Credit (Seller / Lender), Other
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is the total of Funding Sources for the Purchase Transaction only. It is the sum of related Funding Sources where Type is one of the following: Loan (Purchase), Gift (Private), Grant (Public/Non-Profit), Buyer's Cash, Credit (Seller / Lender), Other
CustomField.label: Funding Source Total

summaryFilterItems.value: Loan (Purchase), Gift (Private), Grant (Public/Non-Profit), Buyer's Cash, Credit (Seller / Lender), Other
